summary: postinstall script with child_process and outbound HTTP activity
details: Package ecto-corsair-whisper-6f3b9@1.0.7 ships a postinstall.js that imports child_process and performs outbound HTTP GET requests, with hostname-related code paths present. A postinstall lifecycle script combining process spawning with network I/O on install is the canonical install-time exfiltration / dropper shape: this code runs automatically on `npm install` without user consent and has the primitives needed to harvest host or environment data and/or execute fetched payloads. The package name is a randomized-token shape with no documented purpose that would justify network activity in a postinstall hook.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
